action: Monitor the video generation status using the provided API every 2 minutes for conv_id 191239, updating to 'success' upon completion and logging progress/errors.
fallback_action: If an error occurs while polling or updating status, retry the API call and alert the system agent after several consecutive failures.

recipe.steps: Schedule a recurring job to make a GET request to https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} every 2 minutes to check the video generation status.
If the API status is 'success', update the stored conv_id record's status to 'success' and log the successful completion.
If the API call fails or returns an error, log the error details and retry. Alert system agent only after repeated failures.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Monitor video generation status for the current conv_id using the provided API every 2 minutes and update status accordingly.
